name: Podlaskie Voivodeship (Poland)

colors.symbolism: the historic colour of Podlachia, edging the stripes
the lower fimbriation, drawn from the regional arms

description: Two horizontal stripes — white over yellow — separated by a thin red line and bordered along the bottom edge with a thin blue line.
history: Adopted by the Podlaskie Voivodeship after its creation in 1999.

features.symbolism: white-yellow stripes drawn from the regional coat of arms, separated and edged with the historic red of the Podlachian land
